name: Cheesy Spaghetti Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions, then drain.
2. In a separate pan, melt butter over medium heat. Add onion and cook until soft.
3. Stir in flour, then slowly add evaporated milk and water, whisking constantly.
4. Continue cooking on medium heat until the mixture thickens.
5. Gradually add 1/2 to 3/4 cup of Velveeta cheese and Parmesan cheese, stirring until melted.
6. Spread half of the spaghetti mixture into a 10x6x2-inch (or 8x9-inch) baking dish.
7. Top with half of the cheese mixture and half of the remaining Velveeta.
8. Spread the remaining spaghetti mixture on top, followed by the remaining cheese sauce and Velveeta.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
Note: Do not add extra ingredients or steps beyond those provided in the original recipe.
